nasb.text: Nathanael answered Him, “Rabbi, You are the Son of God; You are the King of Israel.”

esv.text: Nathanael answered him, “Rabbi, you are the Son of God! You are the King of Israel!”

cnv.text: 拿但業說：“拉比，你是　神的兒子，你是以色列的王！”

ccb.text: 拿但业说：“老师，你是上帝的儿子！你是以色列的王！”

csbs.text: 拿旦业说：“拉比，你是神的儿子，你是以色列的王！”
